body_excerpt:
The libtiff packages contain a library of functions for manipulating Tagged Image File Format (TIFF) files.  

Security Fix(es):  

  * libtiff: TIFFRasterScanlineSize64 produce too-big size and could cause OOM (CVE-2023-52355)
  * libtiff: libtiff: Heap-based buffer overflow via crafted PixarLog-compressed TIFF image (CVE-2026-12912)


Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s):  

  * Reintroduce the `tiffcp -i` option (JIRA:AlmaLinux-185328)


For more details about the security issue(s), including the impact, a CVSS score, acknowledgments, and other related information, refer to the CVE page(s) listed in the References section.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Important: libtiff security, bug fix, and enhancement update
